name: setchannel
description: Set current channel as dragon spawn channel (Admin only)

name: serverconfig
description: Configure server settings for raids & black market (Admin only)

name: bal
description: Check your balance

options.name: user
options.description: User to check balance for (leave empty for yourself)

name: casino
description: Gamble your coins (50/50 chance to double or lose)

name: shop
description: Buy packs and boosts with coins

name: daily
description: Claim your daily reward

name: vote
description: Vote for the bot on Top.gg and get rewards!

name: coinflip
description: Flip a coin for double or nothing! Challenge a player or the bot

options.name: opponent
options.description: Challenge another user (leave empty to play vs bot)

name: info
description: View bot information and statistics

name: help
description: View all available commands and how to use them

name: inventory
description: View your dragon inventory

options.name: user
options.description: User to view inventory for (leave empty for yourself)

name: pricecheck
description: Check market prices for a dragon or item

name: dragonlogue
description: View all discovered dragons in this server

name: stats
description: View detailed statistics for a user

options.name: user
options.description: User to check stats for (leave empty for yourself)

name: skill
description: View your active passive item skills

name: dragonnest
description: Access the Dragon Nest leveling system

name: dragonpass
description: View your Dragonpass progress

name: openpacks
description: Open your packs to get dragons

name: alphadragons
description: View and craft Alpha Dragons

name: breed
description: Cross-breed two dragons for a chance at higher rarity!

name: breedcalc
description: Calculate breeding outcomes - select dragons from your inventory!

name: breedqueue
description: Schedule automatic breeding or view your queue

name: ritual
description: Start a community ritual to summon a raid boss

name: raidstatus
description: View the current raid boss and attack it!

name: market
description: View and trade dragons in the server marketplace

name: marketsell
description: List a dragon or item for sale in the marketplace

name: mylistings
description: View and cancel your marketplace listings

name: trade
description: Trade dragons/items with another user - select from inventory

name: gift
description: Gift dragons to another user

name: adventure
description: Send dragons on an adventure for rewards!

name: adventures
description: View your active adventures and rewards

name: leaderboard
description: View server leaderboards

name: bingo
description: Play dragon bingo! Catch dragons to mark your card

name: achievements
description: View your achievements and track your progress

options.name: user
options.description: User to view achievements for (leave empty for yourself)
